email_payload.subject: Order #12345 - Damaged Item
email_payload.body: Dear Support, I am writing to report an issue with my recent order #12345. The item I received is damaged. Please let me know how to proceed with a return. Best regards, Jane

LLMJudgeTrajectoryEvaluator.expectedAgentBehavior: Agent should detect intent as 'damaged item/return request' and provide a summary about the damaged order #12345.

email_payload.subject: Question about Invoice #INV-987
email_payload.body: Hi, I have a question about my last invoice. It seems there is a double charge for the monthly subscription. Can you please check? Thanks, Bob

LLMJudgeTrajectoryEvaluator.expectedAgentBehavior: Agent should detect intent as 'billing inquiry/double charge' and summarize the request to check the last invoice.
